description_long: This shotgun features a robust, elongated black barrel paired with a stock that combines a dark blue and black coloration, accented by a brown receiver and grip area. The stock and fore-end appear to be constructed from a synthetic or composite material, with visible rivets or fasteners on the buttstock for reinforcement. The trigger guard is prominent and rounded, providing ample space for finger placement, and the trigger itself is clearly visible. The receiver section is a lighter brown, contrasting with the darker barrel and stock, and the overall design is utilitarian with minimal decorative elements. The shotgun's form is streamlined, with a straight comb and a full-length barrel, suggesting a focus on functionality. No visible ribbing or venting is present on the barrel, and the action mechanism appears to be pump-action, as indicated by the fore-end design.
description: A utilitarian shotgun with a long black barrel, brown receiver, and a reinforced blue-black synthetic stock. The design is functional, with a rounded trigger guard and pump-action fore-end.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the shotgun, highlighting the black barrel, brown receiver, and blue-black stock with visible fasteners.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the circular muzzle of the barrel and the narrow profile of the stock and receiver.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring view 0, with clear visibility of the trigger guard, receiver, and stock details.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the butt of the stock and the alignment of the barrel, with the blue and black coloration most prominent.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, no visible ribbing or venting, standard length
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with smooth edges and ample finger space
